top_level_fields.name: messages
top_level_fields.description: List of conversation messages. Each message contains a `role` and `content`. Use `system` to define model behavior, `user` for user input, and `assistant` for previous model responses in multi-turn conversations. Example: [{"role": "user", "content": "Explain vector databases in one sentence."}].

top_level_fields.name: temperature
top_level_fields.description: Controls output randomness, range 0-2. Lower values such as 0.2 make output more deterministic. Higher values such as 1.8 make output more random. Default: 1.0.

top_level_fields.name: max_tokens
top_level_fields.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate. Different models have different maximum limits.

top_level_fields.name: stream
top_level_fields.description: Whether to use streaming output. `true` returns a streaming response in SSE format. `false` returns the complete response at once. Default: false.

top_level_fields.name: top_p
top_level_fields.description: Nucleus sampling parameter, range 0-1. Controls diversity of generated text. We recommend using either `top_p` or `temperature`, not both. Default: 1.0.

top_level_fields.name: frequency_penalty
top_level_fields.description: Frequency penalty, range -2.0 to 2.0. Positive values reduce the likelihood of repeating the same words. Default: 0.

top_level_fields.name: presence_penalty
top_level_fields.description: Presence penalty, range -2.0 to 2.0. Positive values increase the likelihood of talking about new topics. Default: 0.

top_level_fields.name: stop
top_level_fields.description: Stop sequences. Up to 4 sequences where generation will stop when encountered.

top_level_fields.name: n
top_level_fields.description: Number of completions to generate. Default: 1. Must be a plain number such as `1`; do not use quotes.

**Supported formats**: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP
**Note**: The Base64 string should not include any whitespace or newline characters.

top_level_fields.name: upload_path
top_level_fields.description:
Custom storage directory path.
If not specified, the system will auto-categorize the file.
**Note**: All files are stored with a `temp/` prefix regardless of the specified path.

top_level_fields.name: file_name
top_level_fields.description:
Custom filename for the uploaded file.
If not specified, the system will generate a unique filename in the format: `{timestamp}_{random}_{extension}`
**Example auto-generated name**: `20251229130857_a8B9cD2e.png`

top_level_fields.name: file
top_level_fields.description:
File binary data to upload.

**Supported image formats**: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP

**Supported video formats**: MP4, WebM, QuickTime/MOV, AVI, MKV

**Maximum**: 1 file per request. Videos are limited to 100MB.

**Retention**: Images expire after 72 hours. Videos expire after 24 hours when stored under the temp/videos lifecycle prefix.

**Note**: The system automatically identifies and categorizes file types.

top_level_fields.name: upload_path
top_level_fields.description:
Custom storage directory path.

Supports both naming conventions:
- **snake_case**: `upload_path`
- **camelCase**: `uploadPath`

If not specified, the system uses `temp`. Video uploads using the default `temp` path are stored as `temp/videos`.

**Note**: API routing normalizes custom paths under the `temp/` prefix.

top_level_fields.name: file_name

- **snake_case**: `file_name`

**Example auto-generated name**: `20251229130857_a8B9cD2e.png`

top_level_fields.description:

**Supported formats**: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP
**Note**: The file will be downloaded from this URL and stored in PoYo AI storage.

input_fields.name: default_param_flag
input_fields.description:
Controls whether to use custom parameters or inherit from the source audio.

- When `true`: Enables custom parameter mode. `prompt`, `style`, `title`, and `continue_at` become required.

- When `false`: Only `audio_id` and `mv` are required.

input_fields.name: audio_id
input_fields.description:
Identifier of the source audio track to extend.

This is the unique ID of an existing track that you want to continue or modify.

input_fields.name: prompt
input_fields.description:
Description of how you want to extend the music.

Required when `default_param_flag` is `true`.

Character limits by model:
- **V4**: Maximum 3000 characters
- **V4_5 & V4_5PLUS**: Maximum 5000 characters
- **V4_5ALL**: Maximum 5000 characters
- **V5**: Maximum 5000 characters
- **V5_5**: Maximum 5000 characters
input_fields.example: Continue with an energetic chorus section

input_fields.name: style
input_fields.description:
Music style specification for the extended section.

Required when `default_param_flag` is `true`.

Character limits by model:
- **V4**: Maximum 200 characters
- **V4_5 & V4_5PLUS**: Maximum 1000 characters
- **V4_5ALL**: Maximum 1000 characters
- **V5**: Maximum 1000 characters
- **V5_5**: Maximum 1000 characters

input_fields.name: title
input_fields.description:
Title for the extended track.

Required when `default_param_flag` is `true`.

Character limits by model:
- **V4**: Maximum 80 characters
- **V4_5 & V4_5PLUS**: Maximum 100 characters
- **V4_5ALL**: Maximum 80 characters
- **V5**: Maximum 100 characters
- **V5_5**: Maximum 100 characters

input_fields.name: continue_at
input_fields.description:
The timestamp (in seconds) from which to start the extension.

Specifies the point in the original track where the extension should begin.

Required when `default_param_flag` is `true`.

input_fields.name: mv
input_fields.description:
AI model version for music extension.

- **V5**: Superior musical expressiveness with faster generation
- **V5_5**: Personalized model tuned to your unique taste.
- **V4_5PLUS**: Enhanced tonal richness with new creative approaches, max 8 min duration
- **V4_5**: Improved prompt intelligence and faster generation, max 8 min duration
- **V4_5ALL**: V4_5ALL enables smarter prompts, faster generations, max 8 min duration
- **V4**: Improved vocal quality, max 4 min duration

input_fields.name: negative_tags
input_fields.description:
Music styles or characteristics to exclude from the extension.

Specify unwanted genres, moods, or instruments to avoid in the output.

input_fields.name: vocal_gender
input_fields.description:
Preferred vocal gender for the extended section.

- `m`: Male vocals
- `f`: Female vocals

**Note**: This parameter increases the probability but cannot guarantee the specified gender.

input_fields.name: style_weight
input_fields.description:
Controls how strongly the specified style influences the extension.

Range: 0-1, up to 2 decimals.

Higher values result in stronger adherence to the specified style.

input_fields.name: weirdness_constraint
input_fields.description:
Controls the level of experimental creativity and unconventional elements.

Range: 0-1, up to 2 decimals.

- Lower values: More conventional music
- Higher values: More experimental and unique outputs

input_fields.name: audio_weight
input_fields.description:
Balances audio characteristics against other generation factors.

Range: 0-1, up to 2 decimals.

Adjusts the emphasis on audio quality and sonic features in the final output.

input_fields.description:
Persona ID to apply to the extended music.

Only available when Custom Mode ( `default_param_flag: true` ) is enabled.

Use this to apply a specific persona style to your music extension.

How to generate persona_id, visit [generate-persona](/api-manual/music-series/generate-persona).

- Higher values: More experimental and unique outputs

top_level_fields.description:

Adjusts the emphasis on audio quality and sonic features in the final output.

input_fields.name: prompt
input_fields.description: Generation prompt describing the desired output

input_fields.name: image_urls
input_fields.description:
Image URLs for generation models.

- 1 image: image-to-video.

- 2 images: first/last-frame video. For `veo3.1-lite-official`,
this mode supports duration 8 only.

- 3 images: `generation_type: "reference"` on supported models.
This mode supports duration 8 only.

- `veo3.1-lite-official` supports at most 2 images.

input_fields.name: generation_type
input_fields.description:
Optional generation type for image-guided generation.

- `frame`: requires exactly 2 `image_urls`. For
`veo3.1-lite-official`, `duration` must be 8.

- `reference`: requires exactly 3 `image_urls` and is not
supported by `veo3.1-lite-official`.

If omitted, PoYo infers the mode from the number of
`image_urls`; two images on `veo3.1-lite-official` still require
`duration: 8`.

input_fields.name: duration
input_fields.description:
Generation duration in seconds.

- Generation models support 4, 6, or 8 seconds.

- `generation_type: "reference"` with three `image_urls`
supports 8 seconds only.

- `veo3.1-lite-official` with two `image_urls` supports 8
seconds only, even when `generation_type` is omitted.

- `veo3.1-lite-official` with `resolution: "1080p"` supports 8
seconds only.

input_fields.name: aspect_ratio
input_fields.description:
Video aspect ratio. `auto` is supported for image-to-video and
first/last-frame generation.

input_fields.name: resolution
input_fields.description:
Output resolution. 4K is available on supported generation
models.

input_fields.name: sound
input_fields.description: Whether to generate audio with the video. Default is `true`.

input_fields.name: image_urls
input_fields.description: Reference image URLs for image-to-video on supported models. - Supports public http/https URLs. - Maximum 3 images. - Frame mode: first image is the start frame, second image is the end frame. - Maximum file size: 10MB. - Supported formats: .jpeg, .jpg, .png, .webp. - `veo3.1-lite` does not support this parameter; do not pass `image_urls`.

input_fields.name: generation_type
input_fields.description: Video generation type. - `frame`: Frame-to-video (two images). - `reference`: Reference image-to-video (three images). - If omitted, inferred by `image_urls` count: 2 for `frame`, 3 for `reference`. - `veo3.1-quality` does not support `reference` mode. - `veo3.1-lite` does not support this parameter; do not pass `generation_type`.

input_fields.name: duration
input_fields.description: Video duration in seconds. VEO 3.1 models on this page use 8 seconds.

input_fields.name: aspect_ratio
input_fields.description: Video aspect ratio

input_fields.name: resolution
input_fields.description:
Output resolution.
- `720p`: Default.
- `1080p`: Full HD.
- `4k`: Ultra HD.
